title: [Clone Firm] Warning notice: zeusystem[dot]ltd
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that there is no connection between the firm Zeus Funds LLC or SCC Ltd (Zeus System) or the website https://zeusystem[dot]ltd/ and ZEUS Anstalt für Vermögensverwaltung, Industriestrasse 2, 9487 Bendern (FL-0002.130.590-7). The companies mentioned and the operators of the website do not have a FMA authorization and are therefore not allowed to provide any financial services that are subject to authorization under Liechtenstein law.   The FMA urgently advises not to make any investments via the companies mentioned or the website https://zeusystem[dot]ltd/ nor responding to any investment offers made by this companies or against transferring money to any account number they might mention. Wrongful claiming the identity of an actually existing company is an attempt to obtain assets that may result in the investor's total loss of the supposed investment.
